title: Survivors of the Dawn
description:
QUINTILLIONS OF BULLETS AGAINST QUINTILLIONS OF ALIEN CHAOSSurvivors of the Dawn is a rogue-lite horde-survival bullet heaven. Bombard QUINTILLIONS of hordes with QUINTILLIONS of bullets! Die, evolve again, explore terminals, unlock weapon item power-ups amidst the chaos, and synergize out of the dawn.RARITY, UPGRADE & ARMORY SYSTEMSBuy items and modify your weapon to wipe out QUINTILLIONS of hordes! In Armory, lower cooldown to fasten reloads, speed up your shots, thin the hordes with pierce, OR raise your bullet count for bigger blasts. Meanwhile, the higher the rarity, the stronger the upgrade—at a cost. 

MIX & MATCH WEAPONS WITH ITEMSUpgrade weapons, stack items, mix and match to wipe out hordes. Oh, extra allies or sparkly power-ups? Just max out some weapon classes.

GO ALL IN ON TERMINALSClear terminals: Heal with Spider Bot or find S.O.S in case of chaos. Wanna challenge yourself? Call more hordes. Leading the difficulty? Drop by Yellow Unknown Calls. You may find some Reroll or Skip chances if lucky enough!

Oh, boy... Meta-progression is far from guaranteed unless you spend your Bounty Bits before your next run!TeamindieGiant Games is a micro studio with massive ideas driven by the passion of making bigger to mountingly more fun and core gameplay mechanics-oriented indie games with high production value. SotD is the solo-developed first ever PC game of the studio.
description_short: это roguelite игра в жанре "выживание в ордах" с множеством пуль. Станьте последней пулей против инопланетного хаоса! Умирайте, эволюционируйте снова, исследуйте терминалы, разблокируйте улучшения оружия и предметов и создавайте синергию на рассвете.
